key_claims: Endurance ride structured as 3-hour zone 2 training with 45 minutes in zone 3 (tempo) at 7/10 effort
Road trip incorporated into training schedule by riding for 3 hours while girlfriend Sarah follows by car to pick up
Zone 2 training forms the predominant portion of endurance session
Traffic and bunch riding conditions provide similar cycling experience
cluster_reasoning: Episode focuses on structured zone 2 and zone 3 training methodology (coaching pillar), with practical application to endurance rides; secondary community assignment reflects the lifestyle/travel integration angle that resonates with cycling culture.
